name: HBV_cccDNA_form
description: HBV covalently closed circular DNA (cccDNA) is the nuclear minichromosome form, ~3.2 kb fully double-stranded with both strands sealed by host DNA repair enzymes from incoming rcDNA. Persistence reservoir for chronic infection; ~5-50 cccDNA copies per infected hepatocyte. Wrapped with histones into a minichromosome and subject to epigenetic regulation (HBx-dependent acetylation). For mapping: read pairs spanning the rcDNA gap junction (between (+)-strand 5' end and (−)-strand 3' end) distinguish cccDNA from rcDNA — only cccDNA gives reads across this junction without a discontinuity.
expected_copy_count: 5-50 cccDNA copies per chronically infected hepatocyte
